profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Eratex Djaja Tbk manufactures and sells garments in Indonesia. It offers jeans, casual dress pants, denims, and twills. The company also offers personal protective equipment comprising plain masks, fashion denim masks, fashion masks, eye protection masks, hazmat suits, medical gowns, and head and shoe covers; and engages in general trading activities. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Surabaya, Indonesia. PT Eratex Djaja Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Ungaran Sari Garments.
profil.berita_terkini: ⚠️ Laporan keuangan dalam USD, harga dalam IDR. Rasio (ROE/ROA/margin) tetap valid, tetapi valuasi per-saham (EPS/PER/PBV/DCF) tidak akurat tanpa konversi kurs.
